description:
Advanced APRS Desktop Client for Windows 10/11 and Linux (Debian/Ubuntu) — built with Electron

Cross-platform desktop client for aprsnet.uk — Windows 10/11 and Debian/Ubuntu Linux. Built with Electron: wraps the full server web UI in a native desktop application with system tray, native OS notifications, GPS positioning, auto member login, two-way filter persistence, real-time settings sync, and persistent appearance settings.
Full Changelog: v1.3.17...v1.3.18
